parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: Utilized to retrieve cards associated with a specific customer using their unique customer_id..

schema.description: The unique token associated with the card, required for tokenized card payments. Use this value to securely process transactions.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Choose between `sandbox` and `production`. Select sandbox to retrieve cards created for test Payment Gateway MIDs, or production to fetch real cards used in live transactions.
